name: signaf
description: Interactive token-cascade agent. Reads AI coding session logs locally, computes the cascade + Steering Efficiency, builds a taste profile, and coaches you on token efficiency. 12 MCP tools.

tools.name: signa_scan
tools.description: Read session logs locally, compute full cascade (Yield, SNR, Leverage, Velocity, class), SE, ASI, and taste profile.
tools.title: Scan session logs

tools.name: signa_diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose your token cascade. Shows class, pillar breakdown, and flags issues (low leverage, low velocity, high input, etc.).
tools.title: Diagnose cascade

tools.name: signa_simulate
tools.description: Simulate a pillar change and project the resulting Yield and class. Shows delta from current state.
tools.title: Simulate change

tools.name: signa_suggest
tools.description: Get ranked recommendations for improving your cascade. Each suggestion shows action, projected yield delta, and effort level.
tools.title: Get suggestions

tools.name: signa_taste
tools.description: Show your behavioral taste profile — 5 dimensions: steering signature, iteration fingerprint, workflow rhythm, cascade personality, correction taxonomy.
tools.title: Show taste profile

tools.name: signa_asi
tools.description: Show your Appropriate Steering Index (ASI v2) — 8 dimensions measuring whether your interventions were the RIGHT ones.
tools.title: Show ASI

tools.name: signa_bridge
tools.description: The taste to cascade bridge: coaching insights connecting your behavioral taste profile to your cascade performance.
tools.title: Taste-cascade bridge

tools.name: signa_cost
tools.description: Show your token-to-cost analysis. Computes total cost based on Claude pricing. Shows cost breakdown and cache savings.
tools.title: Show cost analysis

tools.name: signa_goal
tools.description: Show the path to a target class. Computes what pillar changes are needed to reach the target class from your current state.
tools.title: Goal path

tools.name: signa_compare
tools.description: Compare your cascade against a class average or a specific operator. Shows where you stand relative to the benchmark.
tools.title: Compare cascade

tools.name: signa_track
tools.description: Show your cascade metrics over time from local history. Displays trend lines for Yield, SNR, Leverage, Velocity, and class changes.
tools.title: Track over time

tools.name: signa_anomaly
tools.description: Detect metric drops and anomalies in your cascade history. Pinpoints when a metric dropped and by how much.
tools.title: Detect anomalies
